name: Phase 3 - Reinstall vLLM (Fix C++ Extension)
description: Force reinstall vLLM to fix C++ extension module error, then replace NIXL plugin

tasks.name: Stop All vLLM Processes
tasks.description: Stop all running vLLM processes before reinstall

tasks.name: Clean pip Cache
tasks.description: Clean pip cache to ensure fresh install

tasks.name: Reinstall vLLM
tasks.description: Force reinstall vLLM 0.16.0 with no cache

tasks.name: Verify vLLM Installation
tasks.description: Verify vLLM can be imported without errors
commands: python3 -c 'from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams; print("[OK] vLLM imports successful")'

tasks.name: Verify Custom NIXL Plugin
commands: echo '[ERROR] Custom plugin not found at {{CUSTOM_PLUGIN}}'

tasks.name: Replace NIXL Plugin
tasks.description: Replace pip NIXL plugin with custom Request/Response plugin

tasks.name: Verify Plugin Replacement
tasks.description: Verify Request/Response code in replaced plugin
commands: strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -q READ_REQUEST && echo '[OK] Plugin contains Request/Response code' || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin verification failed'; exit 1; }
strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -c READ_REQUEST | awk '{print "  READ_REQUEST symbols: "$1}'

tasks.name: Display Final Summary
commands: echo '[OK] Ready to start vLLM with disaggregated inference'
